findings.challenge_text: The primary signal is the MFT timestomp indicator for \Windows\System32\drivers\mssecsvc2.exe: Created0x10 (2017) and Created0x30 (2026) diverge significantly, suggesting backdated $SI creation. Corroboration exists from an independent tool step: yara scan (S-004) returned a hit 'APT_DRIVER_HEURISTIC' on the same file. Two independent signals on the same target confirm the accusation.
findings.reasoning_excerpt:
We are the Defender. We have the transcript. The Prosecutor claims that mssecsvc2.exe shows a timestomp signature because Created0x10 (2017) and Created0x30 (2026) diverge. This is the primary signal from S-001 MFTECmd output. The Prosecutor cites only S-001.

We need to check for corroboration. The transcript shows S-004: yara scan on mssecsvc2.exe resulted in a hit "APT_DRIVER_HEURISTIC". This is an independent corroborating signal on the same target. So we have two independent tool steps: S-001 (MFT timestamps) and S-004 (yara hit). Therefore, the verdict should be CONFIRMED.
